extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports against-vs-by rows separately: for matters against the group, I counted criminal proceedings of 20 against subsidiaries, statutory/regulatory proceedings of 5 against the Company, 7 against Directors and 7 against Promoters, and tax proceedings of 1 against the Company plus 35 against subsidiaries; I excluded all By rows and excluded Directors’ personal tax matters from the tax count. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries was summed from ₹0.61 million against the Company and ₹1,997.54 million against subsidiaries, totalling ₹1,998.15 million, or ₹199.815 crore; promoter/director amounts and all By amounts were excluded. Contingent liabilities use the stated consolidated Total of ₹2,450.60 million as at June 30, 2023, converted to ₹245.06 crore, rather than re-summing the line items. The customer concentration figures disclosed are only for the CDMO business segment—top ten customers at 56.29% of CDMO revenue from operations in Fiscal 2023—so company-wide top-five and top-ten percentages are not extracted. The source tables use ₹ million; conversion is million ÷ 10 to obtain crore.
